name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: What you need to know about this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

A lot has happened in this race over the last month, so I wanted to take a moment to update you on the latest news and share why it is so important that we hit our end-of-month goal by midnight tomorrow.

Earlier this month, a dark money super PAC funded by pharmaceutical companies launched TV attack ads against me for my work to lower prescription drug costs. They want to replace me with a representative who will put their corporate interests before the needs of families in our district.

Then, our first Republican opponent filed his paperwork to run against me in the midterm elections. Republicans only need to flip five seats to take back the House majority, and my opponent is looking to defeat me to help them do it.

That's why we need to keep momentum and hit our $20,000 end-of-month goal before the deadline to help make sure we have the resources to protect my targeted seat and the very narrow Democratic House majority.

I don't accept a dime of corporate PAC money, so I'm counting on your support to help us reach our goal. Will you chip in right away to help keep me in Congress fighting for the issues that matter most to you? >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may2021-eom&refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d947a/72735be7/3087d5c1/1e1008c8/1377482253/VEsH/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may2021-eom?gpsid=8_30_19134&refcode=em21_210530_eom5_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210530_eom5_fnd_gq_act__dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=1+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonateschriermay202")**

Thank you,

Kim

\----
Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
To unsubscribe, go to: https://go.drkimschrier.com/unsubscribe

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I’m worried. After four Democrats lost in California last year, the far-right thinks they can win here. I need your help to prove them WRONG! | | | | | | | We learned the hard way last year that not every seat in California is as safe as we thought it would be. But here’s why I know we can still win this race: I’ve met the organized, passionate supporters on the ground in my district, from Palm Springs to Blythe and everywhere in between. If we all do our part and work together, we can spread our message of hope and opportunity to undecided voters and turn them out to vote in the next election! But this is expensive work, so in order to win this Swing District and fight off the extremist Republicans, I need everyone reading this email to pitch in. | | | | | | Thank you, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Asking for a moment of your time this Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
I wanted to ask for a moment of your time to pause with me and remember what this day is about. Today, please join me in remembering and honoring those brave Americans who gave their lives in service to our country – fighting for independence, fighting to defeat slavery and fascism, fighting to defend our freedoms and fighting for our democracy. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30033446/288272228/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2EyZDViZS0wN2MyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wa0fqWRL_NjRi5vFr13oBc-7KfYBdAnG25jGGWI42yY=&emci=6072c49d-10bf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7ca2d5be-07c2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15529135) | I wanted to ask for a moment of your time to pause with me and remember what this day is about. Today, please join me in remembering and honoring those brave Americans who gave their lives in service to our country – fighting for independence, fighting to defeat slavery and fascism, fighting to defend our freedoms and fighting for our democracy. Many of these fallen service members left behind loved ones here in Connecticut’s Fifth District. Today, it is these families and friends that are in my thoughts. I hope you will join me in praying for our Gold Star families and for all the friends and loved ones they left behind. Thank you for taking a moment to read this and to remember what Memorial Day is about. Let us recommit to keeping America’s promises to our Gold Star families and veterans – it is one of the best ways we have to honor the fallen. – Jahana
---

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: The FINAL hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Short but important update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend, I'm reaching out because we're still $3,715 short of our major end-of-month fundraising goal - with only hours left to spare.
To put it as plainly as possible, this would be the absolute worst time to come up short on resources. I'm running against a Republican opponent as extremist and beholden to Trump as they come, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans - controlled by Mitch McConnell - has already targeted this seat. The only way I can fight back is with the support of people like you.
Senate control hangs in the balance right now, Friend: If we lose here, Republicans will call the shots and block every shred of progress the Biden administration attempts to make. **So please, can you spare $5 or more to help us make up this shortfall before it 's too late? Here's the best link to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1030-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500) **
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1030-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=K6CHURhUzphfn8%2B0nrM%2BJIdFADAbPaJd&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

name: Unite the Country
subject: Today, we remember and honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, unitethecountry
body:
Unite the Country [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA005/1/78987/images/utc-web-logo.png]
Dear Peter,

Today, on Memorial Day, we would like to take a moment to honor and remember all brave members of the United States Armed Services who lost their lives defending our country.

As we work to unite our country, it is our responsibility to hold near the memories of those who lost their lives defending our country and show our gratitude to the family members they left behind.

Today and every day, let’s work together to honor the memory of our fallen service members by striving to ensure that freedom, equality, and democracy persevere in this country.

Thank you,

Unite the Country
Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment.
Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. Donate now to support President Joe Biden in the political and legislative fights ahead! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/utc_em?amount=other&refcode=em_utc_fr_email-footer-1]
Follow Unite the Country on YouTube [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCSsSjUM2HmY_luwVlWC1UmA]
Follow Unite the Country on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC]
Follow Unite the Country on Twitter [https://twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC]
Follow Unite the Country on Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/unitethecountry/]

name: Kevin Hern
subject: To those who died to protect our freedoms….
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Let us take a moment to honor our fallen soldiers and appreciate their sacrifice. Read more >>
Dear Peter,
On this Memorial Day, I hope that you’re taking time to honor and remember our fallen heroes... those that sacrificed their all for our freedom.
From the American Revolution to the current global War on Terror, brave soldiers have laid down their lives to keep us safe and free.
These people were sons and daughters, fathers and mothers, brothers, sisters, friends, human. We never want to forget them nor what they did for us to ensure our liberty.
The men and women who sacrificed their lives for the flag deserve to be remembered every day, but especially on Memorial Day. I encourage you to take a moment of silence for the fallen heroes, or even offer a prayer of gratitude for them.
Please take some time today to reflect on the soldiers who gave their lives in service to the United States.
For America,
Kevin Hern[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/149dec17f8958eed/90525047518f6f0ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/149dec17f8958eed/c399c88cf66e4f9ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/149dec17f8958eed/30cbe5235ae7da54c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013BCpt_-8TJnZ0yPOyRX1XIY3raxnql-x2Klz7Zp_Y9QzhS6LGTToJOl8HJkyv-zRijQmg4EMs8kM0vEHZEwc9jk8aWjp1WZDz48KnALkIJsTX-4BcEodM5Rk2OuD4dHDHGuMFFtYUeI=&c=rGyKGHSNoAEI58R-CfpqvrSYkrklmpptmzHnz_VmABma_SkD9Gv2vA==&ch=baBUIzex80ZZJ5S83zLQ4n7U4XBljzWEdsZgbI65sI9gi2XMXXFyfA==).

| | | Friend — **Memorial Day is about acknowledging the past, celebrating the courage, and honoring the sacrifice of every American who gave their life for our country, our democracy, and our nation’s future.** We owe a debt of gratitude for each life given in defense of the freedoms that belong to every American and have a sacred responsibility to do something more with the hope and possibility their selflessness preserves. The ultimate sacrifice is not something that can ever be repaid, but the spirit and determination in defense of our values and each other can and must be carried forward with their memory through our actions. **To fight every day for a better Wisconsin, a better America, and a better tomorrow is the highest tribute we can pay to all those who have fallen in service of our country.** I’m proud to make that pledge, and I hope you’ll join me. Thank you for all that you do, Ron
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Friend — Memorial Day is about acknowledging the past, celebrating the courage, and honoring the sacrifice of every American who gave their life for our country, our democracy, and our nation’s future. We owe a debt of gratitude for each life given in defense of the freedoms that belong to every American and have a sacred responsibility to do something more with the hope and possibility their selflessness preserves. The ultimate sacrifice is not something that can ever be repaid, but the spirit and determination in defense of our values and each other can and must be carried forward with their memory through our actions. To fight every day for a better Wisconsin, a better America, and a better tomorrow is the highest tribute we can pay to all those who have fallen in service of our country. I’m proud to make that pledge, and I hope you’ll join me. Thank you for all that you do, Ron | | | | | | | | | | | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Erica Smith for North Carolina
subject: There’s still a little time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Jayla sent me some updated finance reports this morning. I can’t say how much yet, but believe me when I saw we are SO CLOSE to reaching our $7,000 fundraising goal.
#
Hi there, it’s Erica.
Jayla sent me some updated finance reports this morning. I can’t say how much yet, but believe me when I saw we are SO CLOSE to reaching our $7,000 fundraising goal (an ambitious goal for our scrappy, unapologetic campaign)!!!

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30040962/288298771/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE1ZWYwYi0xOWMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZKzSZ63k-PRzIqIro5xij86ZQ7BFKAjDc2u0Rvy-Ls=&emci=3771c173-7dbd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1215ef0b-19c2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)

| | I'm running for Senate, but I'm not asking you to vote for me. Not yet. That's a privilege I hope to earn over the coming months. **Today, I'm asking you to give Pennsylvanians a _real_ _choice_ on the ballot – between the same old back-room, baby-kissing BS that got us here and leadership ready to step on toes if it means helping working families.** [**We're headed into summer – that's make or break time for an outsider campaign. Can you kick in $3 now to make sure we've got the resources we need?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30040963/288298775/-34735242?refcode=2021-05-31-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1215ef0b-19c2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE1ZWYwYi0xOWMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZKzSZ63k-PRzIqIro5xij86ZQ7BFKAjDc2u0Rvy-Ls=) Donald Trump was right about exactly one thing: the old ways of running our political system have failed us. They've left our country more divided than ever, ground the Senate to a halt, and driven one political party so deep into fantasy, they might as well be taking cues from J.R.R Tolkien. Enough already. If you're like me, you're ready for a different kind of movement that's not interested in impressing big donors, or party big shots, or a Twitter audience. We're only looking to appeal to one group: the working Pennsylvanians who've been shut out and left without a voice for decades. Together, we have the chance to make this election more than just another political horse race, but to return to the democratic ideals of voters choosing our representative. [**If that kind of choice sounds good to you, then please chip in $3 now to show the party establishment that Pennsylvania voters intend to have real options this time.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30040965/288298776/-34735242?refcode=2021-05-31-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1215ef0b-19c2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjE1ZWYwYi0xOWMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZKzSZ63k-PRzIqIro5xij86ZQ7BFKAjDc2u0Rvy-Ls=) Let's make this one different. _John_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | I'm running for Senate, but I'm not asking you to vote for me. Not yet. That's a privilege I hope to earn over the coming months. Today, I'm asking you to give Pennsylvanians a real choice on the ballot – between the same old back-room, baby-kissing BS that got us here and leadership ready to step on toes if it means helping working families. = Donald Trump was right about exactly one thing: the old ways of running our political system have failed us. They've left our country more divided than ever, ground the Senate to a halt, and driven one political party so deep into fantasy, they might as well be taking cues from J.R.R Tolkien. Enough already. If you're like me, you're ready for a different kind of movement that's not interested in impressing big donors, or party big shots, or a Twitter audience. We're only looking to appeal to one group: the working Pennsylvanians who've been shut out and left without a voice for decades. Together, we have the chance to make this election more than just another political horse race, but to return to the democratic ideals of voters choosing our representative. = Let's make this one different. body:
Despite all of our top critics' expectations, Conservatives didn't lose a single race in 2020 like they thought we would.

Friend, it's Will again,

Despite all of our top critics' expectations, Conservatives didn't lose a single race in 2020 like they thought we would. **In fact, we gained more seats in the House.**

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Threadbare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or
body:
I'm coming to you in confidence and I hope you won't share this
message with anyone:

Hi, Peter. As you know, we are just FIVE seats away from taking
back the House for Conservatives and defending Trump's legacy.
TOMORROW, we have the RARE chance to narrow that margin.

EXPRESS DONATE TO THE SPECIAL ELECTION VICTORY FUND >>>
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/scalise-special-election/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210531_PSM-AR.101460_steve-scalise_t1066857-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210531_threadbare)
LINK EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT
The Special Election in New Mexico's 1st Congressional District
is a MUST-WIN. As a TOP patriot, I'm coming to you in confidence
and I hope you won't share this message with anyone:

We're behind and unless you step up RIGHT NOW, we won't be able
to send the critical reinforcements needed to secure victory. The
clock is running out, with only HOURS until polls close, this is
your LAST CHANCE to make a direct and immediate impact on the
future of our nation.
We need IMMEDIATE resources to FLIP this seat RED and put an end
to Pelosi's Socialist agenda once and for all.
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/scalise-special-election/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210531_PSM-AR.101460_steve-scalise_t1066857-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210531_threadbare)

Pundits, pollsters, and the media will read into the results of
this race as a prediction of what's to come. If we lose, they'll
use it against us and stunt our momentum.

With so much on the line, Fellow Conservative, can I count on you
to chip in?

EXPRESS DONATE TO THE SPECIAL ELECTION VICTORY FUND >>>
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/scalise-special-election/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210531_PSM-AR.101460_steve-scalise_t1066857-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210531_threadbare)
LINK EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT
Nancy Pelosi's Majority in the House of Representatives is
hanging on by a thread - in fact, it's the narrowest it's been
since WW2! That's why it's absolutely necessary we do everything
in our power to narrow that margin even further.
(https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/scalise-special-election/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210531_PSM-AR.101460_steve-scalise_t1066857-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210531_threadbare)

We must take back the House. There's nothing more important, and
it's the TOP PRIORITY for many Republican Leaders.

https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/scalise-special-election/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210531_PSM-AR.101460_steve-scalise_t1066857-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PSM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210531_threadbareEXPRESS
DONATE TO THE SPECIAL ELECTION VICTORY FUND >>>
LINK EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT
Trump's legacy is on the line, Fellow Conservative. The stakes
are simply too high for you to sit on the sidelines.

Thank you,

Steve Scalise
House Republican Whip

name: Mike, NRSC Digital Director
subject: One seat is all we need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Where are you? President Trump is back online and everyone is here but your status is offline!

14 Democrats are up for re-election in the Senate.

We only need ONE SEAT to take back our Conservative majority!

Even though 2022 seems far away, Democrats have already started outraising us and we can't afford to LOSE AGAIN!
**[**HELP US FLIP ONE SEAT!**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210531_TY-2.101720_mike-nrsc-digital-director_t1067061-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210531_one-seat-is-all-we-need.)**
---

We just need ONE seat to make sure Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer don't pass any more far-reaching liberal legislation.

We need just ONE seat to make sure the Democrats don't pack the courts!

We need just ONE seat to prevent D.C. Statehood and permanently adding two far left Senators.
**[**HELP US FLIP ONE SEAT!**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210531_TY-2.101720_mike-nrsc-digital-director_t1067061-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210531_one-seat-is-all-we-need.)**

It's absolutely necessary that we reach our end-of-month goal if we're going to beat the Democrats!

[](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210531_TY-2.101720_mike-nrsc-digital-director_t1067061-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210531_one-seat-is-all-we-need.)

name: Elaine Luria
subject: Honoring the fallen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30042827/288305942/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzMxYzM2Ni0xZGMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yltXJ3Cvs2hgq6PdtLPUSWMzbdFnLbgcyvtv0G9Tb_8=)

| | Friends, Today and every day we honor all the fallen heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. We live freely thanks to them. Here in Coastal Virginia, we are acutely aware of the significance Memorial Day holds. Today, I’m remembering my USNA 1997 classmates, LT Jonas Panik, LT Thomas Adams, CAPT Franklin Hooks, SGT Steve Morin, and LT Michael McGreevy and keeping their loved ones in my thoughts and prayers. As we reflect on the service and sacrifice of our military members and families, may we also recommit ourselves to supporting the families who have lost loved ones in service to our country. I fought to repeal an unjust tax hike on Gold Star families, and I’m committed to working in Congress to ensure that our servicemembers and their families receive the benefits they have earned. Our work is far from over. For the sake of all those who have served and made the ultimate sacrifice, we must continue to work across party lines to do what’s right for our veterans and their families during these exceptionally difficult times. I will never stop fighting for you, Elaine Luria
United States Congresswoman, VA-02
---

| | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30042828/288305943/-30985615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzMxYzM2Ni0xZGMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yltXJ3Cvs2hgq6PdtLPUSWMzbdFnLbgcyvtv0G9Tb_8=&emci=219cb689-62be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6c31c366-1dc2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7932963).

I will never stop fighting for you, Elaine Luria United States Congresswoman, VA-02 | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense._

-- Raphael Warnock
-- Jon Ossoff
-- Mark Kelly
-- Maggie Hassan
-- Kyrsten Sinema

Mitch McConnell only needs to unseat ONE of these Democrats to retake the Senate.

name: Team Franchot
subject: Our deadline
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
It’s May 31 -- the final day of our first full month of fundraising for 2021!
Since we were unable to collect contributions while the Maryland General Assembly was in session at the beginning of the year, we’ve had to double our efforts to make up for the lost time caused by that pause.
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we’ve been making good progress in the past few weeks -- but as of right now, we’re just $5,000 short of our goal for May 2021! Will you rush a donation to help us meet our goal by 11:59 PM tonight?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2021eom?refcode=Active&amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2021eom?refcode=Active&amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2021eom?refcode=Active&amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2021eom?refcode=Active&amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2021eom?refcode=Active]We rely on grassroots supporters like you to bring about the change that Maryland needs and deserves. At this early stage in the cycle, your contribution will be critical towards building our statewide campaign infrastructure. By helping us meet our goal, you can help pay for yard signs, bumper stickers, t-shirts, digital ads, future field offices, and other vital tools that will help us reach out to voters.
Peter Franchot is an unprecedented candidate for these unprecedented times. As your next Governor, he will make sure that our state bounces back from this pandemic even stronger than before, and that no community is left behind. He has a bold vision for our state’s future -- one that includes creating 100,000 family-supporting jobs, building world-class transit to kickstart economic growth, making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation, and so much more.
Click here to help us meet our fundraising goal. Together, we can secure a better and brighter future for Maryland in 2022. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2021eom?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot

Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

Peter, I hope you’re enjoying this day with loved ones, friends and family that many of us get to be with for the first time in a very long time.

As we enjoy the company of others, I wanted to take a moment to honor what today is really about.

Memorial Day honors the men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to protect and defend our country.

**Today, my thoughts are with the brave, selfless heroes who died serving and protecting this country. My thoughts are also with the families who have lost loved ones...** We cannot ever thank our service members enough for the sacrifices they make.

Wishing you and your family a safe and healthy holiday weekend, and I appreciate your time reflecting with me on this important day of remembrance.

In gratitude,

Tony
| | Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P.O. Box 15320, Washington, DC 20003
www.tonycardenas.com

body:

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30046820/288314591/-333616605?refcode=email_20210530_SA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IxNGYyNS0yMmMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fuy7xuhA6i2luoSCMyhPefs4ULE20XLdfgzMEKqi7gQ=) Friend, Above the World War I Memorial in my college church is an inscription that I think about today and every Memorial Day: _“While a bright future beckoned, they freely gave their lives and fondest hopes for us and our allies that we might learn from them courage in peace to spend our lives making a better world for others.”_ I love this quote because it serves as both a memorial and a call to action. These words inspire me to do more for others. However you choose to spend your Memorial Day—whether or not you have the good fortune to gather with family and friends for the first time in a long time—please join me in reflecting on how each of us can find the courage to serve. To serve our friends, our families, our communities, and our country is perhaps the greatest respect we can pay to the men and women who have given their lives for all of us. May we all have the courage to serve. -Seth

\--DON'T delete this email
\--DON'T close your computer
\--DON'T give the Democrats another seat in the House with which to hold their socialist agenda over our heads!

The election for New Mexico's 1st District is now just DAYS away, and Democrats are PUMPING in outside dollars to DEFEAT Conservatives. We need to FULFILL our promise of ENDING the Democratic Majority -- meaning we CANNOT let Democrats win seats like this.

[**But we can STOP this Liberal momentum and prevent the Democrat party from EXPANDING THEIR MAJORITY if grassroots Republicans everywhere chip in $25 to push House Republicans over the finish line before it 's too late. name: Mike Collier
subject: this is my promise to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Friend —

Nearly 160 years ago, Abraham Lincoln stood at Gettysburg to honor those that gave the last full measure of devotion so that our nation, conceived in liberty, might long endure. Today, we honor the men and women who, over our 250 year history, gave their lives so that democracy might live.

We find ourselves now engaged in a new struggle to determine whether that democracy will survive in America. For the second time in our history, the transfer of presidential power was bathed in violence. Confidence in our sacred election was assaulted by those that would destroy democracy rather than accepting defeat. Unbelievably, our Capitol was violently attacked by insurgents who were summoned, and then were stoked, by elected officials.

I would never have guessed this could happen in America. But it has. And now patriots must act.

I have to be honest — to shutter my business and run for statewide office would have been a difficult decision in ordinary times. But these are not ordinary times. I witnessed Dan Patrick cast his lot with the Big Lie conspirators, and therefore this is my promise to you : I will fight with all I’ve got to defeat Dan Patrick.

Each Memorial Day my thoughts turn to my closest friend Charles Wade Doty who was killed when his fighter jet crashed during the Gulf War. He gave the last full measure of his devotion to me, to you, to freedom. And now I fight for Chuck so that neither he, nor any fallen patriot, will have died in vain.

On this solemn Memorial Day, let us renew our commitment to democracy. Let us honor our fallen patriots by being Americans worthy of their sacrifice.

Thank you for standing with me,

— Mike Collier

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-email-may2021?refcode=em210531-memorialday&amount=5&]
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States

Peter — Memorial Day holds a special meaning for me coming from a military family. Today, we honor the brave Americans who gave the ultimate sacrifice for our country and for our freedom. We owe an unpayable debt of gratitude to those who lost their lives fighting for us back home. And we must show our gratitude beyond just words. As Lt. Governor, I pledge to honor and uphold the brave men and women who currently serve, our veterans, and the families of those who have lost someone in the service. Our freedom comes at a cost. Please join me in honoring those who paid that price today and every day. With love, Hala
As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She’s running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it’ll take to get it done. **Will you pitch in to join our movement for a brighter future for all?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30048369/288320437/2006474955?refcode=hla-em-210531&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWNhMzMyZS0yN2MyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-vUgnaP0_n33S9V9lg45kd90vpChafMSYX3dJZWBUc=)

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: On Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
Memorial Day is more than the unofficial start of summer. It is a day when we pause and pay respect to those brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedom and security.
As a Marine, I have had the sad duty of advising the next of kin of comrades lost in the heat of battle and by disease or accident. It is always very difficult, incredibly sad, and never easy.
This Memorial Day, it is important to remember all those we have lost, and to remember the opportunities that we are afforded due to their sacrifice. America is unlike any country on earth. It is a truly unique place where, no matter who you are or where you come from, you can make your dreams come true. My commitment to you, on this Memorial Day, is to work to make this promise real for every American.
I hope you will join me on this Memorial Day in remembering the ultimate sacrifice of Americans who have fallen in the service of this great nation.
-- Stewart
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: This Memorial Day
body:
This Memorial Day, we pause with solemn gratitude to honor and remember the brave men and women who laid down their lives
|
---
Dear Friends, This Memorial Day, we pause with solemn gratitude to honor and remember the brave men and women who laid down their lives to preserve our freedom, and we pray for lasting peace throughout our Commonwealth, our nation, and the world so that future generations may enjoy the blessings of liberty. Since the founding of our great Commonwealth, Virginians have proudly answered the call to duty and given their lives in heroic service to our nation. These patriots were bound by their love of country and united in their quest to uphold our founding ideals. Their selfless acts of courage and patriotism embody the very best of our Commonwealth and our nation, and it is our responsibility to ensure that their sacrifices were not in vain. We must come together as they did, to continue their work and to build a brighter and better future for everyone. Today, and every day, we honor the extraordinary service members who paid the ultimate sacrifice in service to our nation. Let us pray for the fallen and for the loved ones they left behind. Let us continue our enduring mission of building a Commonwealth and a nation worthy of the patriots we honor today.
---
---
-Glenn Youngkin
---

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Reminder: Our team is growing!
body:
Be a part of the team that will make a difference.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hi Friends!
I have been so blessed by the outpouring of support for my Congressional run. Our volunteer list has doubled in the last week, we have Field Directors for each county, and I have had the pleasure of personally visiting with the amazing people of District 3 at one meet and greet after another. The event at Rhett's Ranch in Chinook was such an encouraging time visiting with citizens ready to get off the bench and join the fight!!
The Heidi St. John For Congress Facebook and Instagram pages have been rapidly growing and this is all thanks to you. By working together as a team, we are fighting for this country and our rights as families. We must protect our children and I am committed to leading that fight! If you aren't following the campaign on social media, you can find links to both pages below. You don't want to miss important updates, videos, articles, and interviews as they are released.
My national speaking tour has us in Florida this weekend, connecting with other like-minded conservatives desperate to turn this country around. Friends, we are not alone. There are people all over the nation just like you, willing to invest in the fight for the most important thing in our district and our country...our children.
It is going to take a lot of money to win this race and I cannot do it without your support. Your donation is an investment in protecting what we know made America great.
There are 431 days until the primary. We have to take this country back and I am your Conservative voice in the fight!

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: America’s TRUE values (enclosed)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MCCARTHY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend, Today is Memorial Day, a day to remember those who’ve lost their lives in service to our great nation. We stand with our brave men and women of the Armed Forces and salute their sacrifice. **They fought for America so we could continue to stand for freedom, human rights, and equality.** **_In contrast, the Democrats think all America stands for is racism, oppression, and “inequity.”_**
The Socialist Left could not be more wrong with what America’s true values are, and the only way to stand up to them is by stepping up towards our **[End of Month deadline before it arrives at 11:59 clean_body: Friend, Today is Memorial Day, a day to remember those who’ve lost their lives in service to our great nation. We stand with our brave men and women of the Armed Forces and salute their sacrifice. They fought for America so we could continue to stand for freedom, human rights, and equality. In contrast, the Democrats think all America stands for is racism, oppression, and “inequity.” The Socialist Left could not be more wrong with what America’s true values are, and the only way to stand up to them is by stepping up towards our Thank you for your patriotism, Kevin McCarthy This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Today we honor those we’ve lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I hope you’ll join me in taking this time to reflect on the sacrifices of our service members.

| Friend,
Today and every day, we honor the members of our military who paid the ultimate price serving and protecting our country, and the families and loved ones they left behind.

San Diego is a proud military community, home to the largest concentration of military personnel and the third-largest veteran population in the country. Our community understands the immense sacrifice of our service members and military families, and we honor them.

This month, I visited Arlington National Cemetery and laid a wreath at the Military Women’s Memorial to honor those who served in our Armed Forces and reflect on the ways they lived and died. We must ensure their and all service members’ sacrifices were not in vain by doing everything we can to safeguard the freedoms they gave their lives for, and only send them into harm’s way as a last resort.

Today, I hope you’ll join me in taking this time to reflect on the sacrifices of our service members — including those who made the ultimate sacrifice — and comfort and honor the families who mourn them. May their memories be a blessing.

Thank you,

Sara
---

* * *

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: The Story of a Gold Star Wife
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| Peter -
Celebrate the lives of the fallen today, and take a moment to understand that, for many families, every day is Memorial Day.
I wrote this as a short story, which you can read below, based on the real stories of so many Gold Star families. Honestly it was hard for me to write, and I'm not an emotional person at all.
For those of us who have lost friends, we spend the day celebrating them. Tara and I make plans with our friends from the Teams, and we share stories about the fallen, we toast to them while their pictures hang from the wall.
It's a personal day for us. For the guys, and these Gold Star families, no one talks politics, no one talks foreign policy, and no one gets riled up if others just "don't care enough" about the significance of this day. It's our day to reconnect and bring our brothers back to life in some small way.
Never forget.
Dan Crenshaw
---
| | |
---
| THE STORY OF A GOLD STAR WIFE

She wakes up from a pleasant dream, for once. Usually, they are nightmares. He was in it this time, as if nothing was wrong and life was just as it was. Boring. Perfectly boring. They were laughing about something, watching TV together just as they used to. For a split second she is still in the dream as she reaches her hand across the bed to touch him. But he isn't there.
She remembers now. And with that realization comes the gut-wrenching wave of grief that she is all too familiar with. Tears well up. She squeezes her eyes shut and clutches her fists tightly in front of her face. She wants to scream but she knows from experience it doesn't really help, and it scares her son who is still too young to understand what's going on. His dad was killed in action a year ago, when he was just 2 years old. He misses him, she can tell, but it's obvious he doesn't know how to process death yet.
By now, the calls and friendly check-ins have mostly stopped. It was amazing at first, when the community pulled together in the most incredible of ways. She was grateful. She truly didn't have to worry about anything, whether it was groceries or work or even money. What the military didn't provide was made up for by his fellow SEALs and their wives.
But eventually people move on. They don't forget, per se, but they go back to their routines. They come over and try to make conversation. She isn't good at conversation anymore, so she tells them that she's doing fine, even though she isn't. They figure they should come by less and less. Only a couple still check in occasionally. She used to be close with his family, but grief does strange things to people, and they don't talk much anymore except to arrange visits with her son.
To miss someone profoundly is to wonder what life would be like if they were still there. To know that every moment would be better if they were back in your arms. Every morning would be normal, instead of a crushing blow to the soul. Every evening would be full of laughter, instead of just...empty. Even some marital bickering would be welcome. What she would give, even for a fight over the obnoxious way he loaded the dishwasher.
For those of us who have lost our brothers to war, we grieve. We miss them. We never forget. But we are not broken by it. We know this is the life we chose, to be on the front lines, to serve in the most dangerous of ways. Crazy, maybe, but true nonetheless.
But for the Gold Star widow, she never pursued war. She was asked by her husband and her country to remain behind and remain strong, often not knowing whether or not her soulmate was even in danger. She learned to get through the nights while he was on deployment by imagining what he was doing, picturing him bored and playing Call of Duty instead of prepping for a mission. She had practice, given they had been through four deployments together.
But now, his brothers in arms have moved on to the next deployment, and she is the only one that wakes up alone each morning. She gets no reprieve, no rest from the grief. She is the one who must endure.
Another year goes by. She begins to function better and starts a foundation in her husband's name. He was passionate about horses, growing up on a ranch, so she raises money to get disabled vets and special needs kids trained to ride. It helps a little, and it keeps her busy. It keeps him alive, in a small way. Being around the horses reminds her of him in a pleasant kind of way. She finds herself searching the horse's gaze for some kind of sign from him, as if he might speak through them somehow. She still hasn't cleaned out his closet. The smell of his clothes is all she has left.
A couple more years go by, and she goes on a few dates. Nice guys, but no sparks fly. Not like the first time she met her husband. At first, she thinks she should date outside the military completely. Seems to make sense. But it's impossible. These guys don't get it, on any level. They are intimidated by her, never knowing what to say. Losing hope, she reconnects with an old teammate of her husband's for drinks, and for the first time in a while she remembers what a connection feels like. It turns into more, and a year later they're talking about marriage.
She will always be her late husband's wife, a reality that only her late husband's teammate can understand. They marry, and she's beginning to remember what joy feels like again. The pain is finally dulled, but it never really goes away.
This is the real Memorial Day. It is the day that never goes away, with no real beginning and no end. It isn't one day a year, but a constant ache deep down in the soul of those who understand what real sacrifice is. For everyone else it is only once a year, a time to recall that these sacrifices happened at all and that we should remember them. For too many, it's just a day off work, a day to slash prices, a day to throw a party. For the Gold Star families, it's a day they observe with a mix of gratitude and dread: grateful the country remembers, grateful for the opportunity to speak openly about their loss without getting an awkward look, but dreading the culmination of emotion the day brings with it.
On this Memorial Day, may we hope that more Americans will remember, and understand what this day means for those who can't ever forget.

Share on [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a2nFyvZ5ygOx8SJkIUsOFerfb-MkeDdyCH_GOVZz3-5rF-YqW_LG-ivoERv61cPS0sQVBdATIluiaSLQwtXolFScjtXy8YxXsacAI2zVsGwMxVCn7Antqc2YiH1RmOwLPtVDN2A3zEtTLn0y4qnnORCHp_z_UKLXjh02ntNPpCajXFoYHetYpGdzKMmgoZZxo1rq8sJAcg4=&c=MMGhm8A236K-te06JJ4fKkqqabH4713wpNJUPb73xlpkwIZpIv-77g==&ch=kY8FGD65RutO6tnxtl_S_BLnZB2NgOIxlaasP60kF2T-cVyW5hT2qA==), [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a2nFyvZ5ygOx8SJkIUsOFerfb-MkeDdyCH_GOVZz3-5rF-YqW_LG-ivoERv61cPS1Jb9SKP9yEZ6RiVS6G_QyLJE5upmd5oKzuH-nelbQ97AcH0bc8T4gEzc4GiGPUhvC30AHc6SiwPhz1DCUGsctMN9VXwQMhSRxo-DsLN3XYRHWSniTyXD7GxbywMzw-AI6k-OFAA6zycNt1xJeenEgw==&c=MMGhm8A236K-te06JJ4fKkqqabH4713wpNJUPb73xlpkwIZpIv-77g==&ch=kY8FGD65RutO6tnxtl_S_BLnZB2NgOIxlaasP60kF2T-cVyW5hT2qA==), and [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a2nFyvZ5ygOx8SJkIUsOFerfb-MkeDdyCH_GOVZz3-5rF-YqW_LG-ivoERv61cPSXNGz-UewhZ12g-3e1jw9lf_Hv9on7Waq-HbJFadOad3kOR6ebY2zHaSUgEG0fNPB0SyTb9Sj4rfWGlJEgATJIPNuS8b7i1zjCfRtMhNhdqy9cEuYWGfwVeJ_C7NKErSMO5pDHXTNJD7D-X58pS6DqQ==&c=MMGhm8A236K-te06JJ4fKkqqabH4713wpNJUPb73xlpkwIZpIv-77g==&ch=kY8FGD65RutO6tnxtl_S_BLnZB2NgOIxlaasP60kF2T-cVyW5hT2qA==)

It is the day that never goes away, with no real beginning and no end. It isn't one day a year, but a constant ache deep down in the soul of those who understand what real sacrifice is. For everyone else it is only once a year, a time to recall that these sacrifices happened at all and that we should remember them. For too many, it's just a day off work, a day to slash prices, a day to throw a party. For the Gold Star families, it's a day they observe with a mix of gratitude and dread: grateful the country remembers, grateful for the opportunity to speak openly about their loss without getting an awkward look, but dreading the culmination of emotion the day brings with it. On this Memorial Day, may we hope that more Americans will remember, and understand what this day means for those who can't ever forget. Share on ==, ==, and == | | | | | | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: Karen Bass
subject: In remembrance and in honor of the ones we've lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress |
body:
Friend,

Today, we give thanks and honor the brave Americans who made the ultimate sacrifice serving our nation and defending our democracy in the Armed Forces.

We can never truly repay those who lost their lives. What we can do is strive to support the people who do return home safely and policies that offer these heroes the dignity and respect they deserve. We honor their sacrifice by fighting for a just and equitable country.

On this Memorial Day, I hope for a speedy and safe return home of our troops who are in harm's way. I look forward to a day absent of war and conflict, but today, I remember and honor the ones we've lost.

Thank you,

Karen

name: Christy Smith
subject: This Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30050854/288332029/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODBmNTRkZC0yZWMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hup9XfWq7W0_UdYB2N9jCxjZtjpMtuINgf_hAXt-nxk=&emci=32dcea0a-41be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=580f54dd-2ec2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

On this day, and every single day, we must remember the service and legacies of those patriots who have lost their lives in honor of this country.

Traditionally, this day is for members of the military -- those who risk everything to protect the rights and freedoms we value so deeply in this country.

But on Memorial Day in 2021, in which so many of us can finally see one another safely, in-person, and without masks for the first time in over a year, I find myself filled with gratitude.

I'm thinking about the doctors, nurses, and healthcare workers who dedicated everything to protecting us and our loved ones while risking their own lives. Thinking about the grocery store clerks, food delivery folks, cooks who prepared our take-out food, and so many more who kept our country running during unsafe times. Thinking about teachers and childcare providers who changed their entire way of teaching to keep our kids on track.

**I feel an overwhelming amount of gratitude today to so many, and I hope you do too, Peter.**

I will never forget that during the hardest year in many of our lives, so many people showed bravery and resiliency in service to our country. **That's what our country is all about.**

Thank you, stay safe, and have a peaceful Memorial Day.

\-- Christy

| Christy Smith is only soliciting funds that comply with federal campaign finance laws.
---

clean_body: Our deadline is here. | | | = | | I won’t lie, we’re in deep trouble, Derek. We already missed a HUGE finance deadline, and while we put together a new goal of getting 2,000 donations by midnight tonight to make up the difference, we STILL aren’t where we need to be. If we miss tonight’s goal, we’re finished. Missing two goals with just over a week until the primary would be disastrous , Derek. I know you understand just how severe the situation is, but just a reminder -- Glenn Youngkin, Donald Trump, and Ted Cruz are ready to do, say, and spend whatever’s necessary to buy the Governor’s office. Right now, Glenn Youngkin is watching us like a hawk, waiting for one little slip up to capitalize on, and we just gave him a massive one. = Ellie Warner Finance Director Terry for VA | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Remembering America’s heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Thank you to all the men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to preserve the greatest country in human history. We owe you a debt we can never r Thank you to all the men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to preserve the greatest country in human history. We owe you a debt we can never repay. |
---
Peter,

As you know, I had the opportunity to serve the United States as a National Guardsman deployed to Afghanistan. I understand what it takes to dedicate your life to serving your country and the sacrifices that it entails. I feel honored to have served alongside the most patriotic Americans.

Memorial Day is our opportunity to honor those who lost their lives serving our great nation. **I want to take this day to say thank you to all the men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to preserve the greatest country in human history. We owe you a debt we can never repay.**

I also want to give my condolences to anyone who has lost a soldier - a family member, a friend, a brother in arms that was serving our country. Their sacrifice will not soon be forgotten and their memory will live on.

Thank you and God Bless,

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: You're a person I can trust
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blaine For Congress
body:

Peter, it's Kevin McCarthy. Your quality support for conservative values has shown me that you're a person I can trust.

name: Vanessa Clifford
subject: Malcolm asked me to reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey again. Vanessa Clifford here, Malcolm's Campaign Manager.
Malcolm asked me to write to a few supporters today about today's deadline. We've been emailing because we have a big goal to hit, and missing our goal could force us to cut back on our ambitious campaign plan for June.
What’s most important is that we generate as many individual donations as we possibly can before midnight. Donations of any amount. Whatever people can afford.
The number of people who donate is what’s important to us and to Malcolm because it shows how many people are a part of our coalition — and it shows the naysayers counting us out that we have what it takes to win.
So, that’s why I’m emailing. I was hoping you could make a donation to our campaign today. Even $3 will go a very long way — both to ensuring we have resources to reach folks in every corner of Pennsylvania and to sending a powerful message about the strength of our movement. Please use this link:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_em_q22021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30052863/288340010/-347207331?refcode2=822584d9-35c2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210531-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI1ODRkOS0zNWMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t1Yj73hUIo58ldCv2FNeRQK-bzOzPE7aCpu9lWSYkXo=)**
Thanks for reading. I’m gonna send Malcolm a list of donors shortly, and I know it’ll mean a lot if your name is on it.
Best,
Vanessa

* * *

name: Salud Carbajal
subject: This Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yoqwJe6mFfRMTr0bayagaKNCYwBZ81R3gTrJZrTHesM=/pcMTgJT5L_zltP-WuePrO70-WgBnno0YM7sNXemAB9o=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Please join me today in paying tribute to the many servicemembers who have made the ultimate sacrifice for our country as well as their families.
Our country is what it is today because of those who gave everything. As you enjoy this long weekend please take a moment to think about the many Americans who lost their lives on the battlefield, and what a different place our country would be today if they hadn't made that sacrifice.
Thank you for joining me today in remembering our fallen servicemembers and their families and thanking them for all they sacrificed for our country.

Sincerely,
Salud

**Take Our Country Back
**
Dear Friend,
You’re probably wondering why our emails sometimes seem rushed.

It’s not that we leave things to the last minute. **It’s that every minute of every day matters when we’re fighting to take back our country from the radicals on the Left.**

[So, Friend, with May ending in just a few hours I’m asking you to please chip in whatever you can afford before the clock strikes midnight](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7aa4d414f5214899a788075cc9549824&_e=-OxtB7MbB_98Qi-jKF8mS5v3QBCgrMpkfjdBz6ngs-99Hfy-JdrkegBeA_y7-YUuM1H8-oVRAtZggaJzj4we8TNpGTd475ev4C273DuM8HFvNprAeVUQiA4-NDKvCyx4JSV0RQlzOC_GkTdOfHjlIJ4L7Blw4xHqJYCZ5qN_JJWtF9YbVoOtIckp082XAJz73qjp5cTgSU8vF5OXvRkCtLcjFPzBs_jHmeQMBkBqfmr3aXHw-akQQnt2o8Rx6T6L2_l1u7oeBmuwiBxqHj_FQimA65VkdgzvsE4WLJ-RuhA%3D).
[**Donate Today**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7aa4d414f5214899a788075cc9549824&_e=-OxtB7MbB_98Qi-jKF8mS5v3QBCgrMpkfjdBz6ngs-99Hfy-JdrkegBeA_y7-YUuM1H8-oVRAtZggaJzj4we8Tdvx8KRiASxUvrZAs_28wu3NmK0H7FQscMw6__invXyHFTuYzOXpPOwUyAGivjgcjTQ0Vfr5SEhs-q7ShpBSaHUWmi798Vlb9e-hJ8g5KNe89I7UmUjlawA7TdG5bsHh3tAYmD8V1YLunKqKTGVZGi87mvsh_pmTA4IhH_5c4J0bN69FE5wOaqhgr0H8tf0WaPFUDWwaX62xySHpdv12vY%3D)
Every dollar you send will go to our Take Back The House campaign to make sure Democrats are defeated next year.

**Just this month, we’ve seen how much more radical the Left can get... runaway spending... supporting terrorists... taking over our schools... defunding the police...**

Taking back the House has never been more important. This is the only way we will reclaim America. It's up to patriots like you and me, Friend, to make that happen, **starting now. **

So if you’ve had enough of being silenced by the Left... if you’re fed up with rising crime and gas shortages... if you’re concerned about the future of our country... and if you want your kids to grow up in a safe place that respects traditional values... **Please donate before midnight tonight to help us make that happen. **

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: This Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer |
body:
Peter,

It's Memorial Day, and every year, I remind my daughters of the meaning behind this day. This is not a day off from school. It’s not just a day off from work. It’s meant to be a day of remembrance.

Today our nation takes a moment to pay tribute to those patriotic Americans who lost their lives in service to our nation. Because of that sacrifice and commitment, my grandma was able to survive World War II, emigrate to the US, and become the proudest American citizen you could’ve ever met. Because of that sacrifice and commitment, my daughters, Sophie and Tess, are growing up in a better world. Because of that sacrifice and commitment, you and I are able to enjoy the freedoms we share as Americans.

Showing gratitude for those who are no longer with us is important. But I think more is expected of us.

In addition to honoring their sacrifices, we also need to show an appreciation for the freedoms they died for. America is the greatest country on the planet, and that's largely thanks to the men and women who fought for it.

We must also do better for every single person who currently serves. This Memorial Day, we should all be conscious of the fact that military action often comes at a significant price. That means America needs a smart, more strategic approach to foreign policy. It means that, when military action occurs, our nation needs to provide the training and equipment our servicemembers need. It means we must do everything we can to bring each service member home safely.

This Memorial Day, I hope you’ll join me in commemorating the brave Americans who made the ultimate sacrifice.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek Kilmer

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer |
---------------------------------------------

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

| | | | Peter,

Each year, we identify several "priority candidates" to help supporters of the House Freedom Caucus know which candidates are in close races and need the most help.

Our current list includes U.S. Reps. **Lauren Boebert** (R-CO), **Yvette Herrell** (R-NM), and **Scott Perry** (R-PA).

The House Freedom Fund will pay all processing expenses and transfer 100% of your donations to their campaigns.

**Republicans could retake control of the House next year, but we need to work together to make sure it's a conservative Congress with a backbone.**

That's why HFF supports the current members of the House Freedom Caucus and is working to identify new challengers who can replace liberal Democrats and Republicans In Name Only (RINOs).

body:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30054001/288343882/-1587469312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MThiOTA0Yi0zYWMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHQ7tlbtyKSsN1x2WvruPyj02KOzAXXmF0pu4IKkSzo=&emci=c673903c-65be-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=818b904b-3ac2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18634996)**
Friend,

Today, we are remembering those who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our country.

It’s a day to honor those who gave their life in the pursuit of liberty. We owe them a debt of gratitude for making the ultimate sacrifice.

I know so many Arizonan heroes who died on the frontlines, and I am forever grateful for their sacrifice. We must honor their bravery and recommit to the ideals they fought for. Today I am keeping in my thoughts the families of those who lost loved ones on the battlefield.

I am grateful to all those who have served our country, and I pray for those who are still in harm’s way today.

I hope you join me in remembering our heroes this Memorial Day.

\-- Tom

clean_body: Friend, Today, we are remembering those who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our country. It’s a day to honor those who gave their life in the pursuit of liberty. We owe them a debt of gratitude for making the ultimate sacrifice. I know so many Arizonan heroes who died on the frontlines, and I am forever grateful for their sacrifice. We must honor their bravery and recommit to the ideals they fought for. Today I am keeping in my thoughts the families of those who lost loved ones on the battlefield. I am grateful to all those who have served our country, and I pray for those who are still in harm’s way today. I hope you join me in remembering our heroes this Memorial Day. \-- Tom | To learn more, please visit and follow Tom on , , and . | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: This Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: paid for by those who risked their lives on the battlefield, and on Memorial Day, we remember those who gave the ultimate sacrifice
body:
I want to remember the real reason we recognize Memorial Day every year. Read more >>
Peter, It’s easy to get lost in enjoying the three-day weekend provided by Memorial Day, but I want to encourage everyone to take some time today to really reflect on what it means. Our freedom in America was bought and paid for by those who risked their lives on the battlefield, and on Memorial Day, we remember those who gave the ultimate sacrifice. Lives have been lost defending American liberty and fighting tyranny from the first battles of the Revolution to the most recent War on Terror, and every single one deserves honor and recognition. We owe them a debt of gratitude. Without them, our country wouldn’t exist at all. Let’s all remember the sacrifices others have made for us, and do what we can to honor those who laid their lives down.
In remembrance,
Kevin Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/7acabcf599f86ffe/398b4eea747657a1c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/7acabcf599f86ffe/7535ba3a7524dfa5c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/7acabcf599f86ffe/b8cd3e93816377b1c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/7acabcf599f86ffe/61d1174dc909c307c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Remember the fallen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
We must teach our children |
---
| | Dear , As we remember those who gave the full measure of love for our families, our communities and our nation, let us not forget what Francis Scott Key memorialized in our national anthem, a battle for the survival of our nation.

Few children today are taught about the details of the battle of Ft. McHenry, and the flag which flew over it.

The flag representing the principles we all should hold dear, was held high by the bodies of all of the Americans who died the night of the bombardment.

Let us never forget the sacrifice of all the courageous men and women who have given their full measure to protect and defend our liberty.

Don’t simply thank veterans for their service, be thankful to those who did not make it home this Memorial Day. Act thankful.
---
| |
---
| God Bless,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9cd2eb8066&e=44b8c466b0)

name: Mark Levine
subject: This Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Levine for Virginia Levine for VA
body:
| | | Team, We wanted to take a moment to reach out in celebration of Memorial Day. This is a day meant for spending time with family and friends and to honor those who gave their lives in service of our country. This is a particularly special Memorial Day because, for so many of us, this is our first time getting to see the people we care about in person rather than over Zoom. Here are some pictures from Alexandria's bi-annual observance on Memorial’s Day and Veteran Day at Rocky Versace Plaza. Captain Versace, a native of Alexandria, was the only serviceman in the Vietnam War to receive the Medal of Honor who is still missing in action. We remember his bravery twice a year and read the names of the other 67 Alexandria servicemen who died or went missing in the Vietnam War. We also want to acknowledge that with Memorial Day comes recognizing the fact that this country has not always treated those who chose to serve it equally. Today, we also honor Black Americans that fought in WWII that were treated as second-class citizens upon their return home. And we honor gay and lesbians and bisexual soldiers who lived in fear of being ousted under Don’t Ask Don’t Tell. We also honoring transgender soldiers who faced cruel discrimination under the Trump Administration’s exclusionary policies. It’s a day to remember what so many men and women have given up to allow us to live in this society, but it’s also a day to remember how far we still need to go as a nation and as a Commonwealth. I will work every single day as Virginia’s next Lieutenant Governor to make sure that we honor all who gave their lives for our country as well as all who lived to come back. Have a happy and safe Memorial Day. _\-- Mark Levine_ Paid for by Levine for Virginia Levine for VA
805 Rivergate Pl
Alexandria, VA 22314
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/16929c46-3fc2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/7a221d14-40c2-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODYwNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTIyMWQxNC00MGMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBm1MdJAOjJOnupTiEuabQMCofHFFdKOFEj90QbpK9A=&id=121252690).
** **

name: Team Gallagher
subject: Sacrifice and courage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
The least we can do for those who have laid down their lives in the line of duty is to honor and remember their sacrifice and courage. Peter, **Sacrifice and courage. ** Every Memorial Day we think about those traits, and we think about the generations of Americans who have paid the ultimate price so that we can live in a country full of freedom. The least we can do for those who have laid down their lives in the line of duty is to honor and remember their sacrifice and courage. _That’s why Mike, along with fellow Rep. Jason Crow, has been working since 2019 to establish a Global War on Terrorism (GWOT) Memorial on our National Mall in Washington, DC._ | |
---
|
---
This memorial will serve as a place where veterans, families, and civilians alike can reflect on the immense sacrifice of those who served in the GWOT.

**Peter, in observance of today’s holiday, we ask that you join us in honoring America’s heroes.**

Thank you,

Team Gallagher
|

|

clean_body: The least we can do for those who have laid down their lives in the line of duty is to honor and remember their sacrifice and courage. Peter, Sacrifice and courage. Every Memorial Day we think about those traits, and we think about the generations of Americans who have paid the ultimate price so that we can live in a country full of freedom. The least we can do for those who have laid down their lives in the line of duty is to honor and remember their sacrifice and courage. That’s why Mike, along with fellow Rep. Jason Crow, has been working since 2019 to establish a Global War on Terrorism (GWOT) Memorial on our National Mall in Washington, DC. | | | This memorial will serve as a place where veterans, families, and civilians alike can reflect on the immense sacrifice of those who served in the GWOT. Peter, in observance of today’s holiday, we ask that you join us in honoring America’s heroes. Thank you, Team Gallagher | | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Taking this seriously...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey, there — it’s Emma Brown, Mark’s Campaign Manager.
I know you’ve heard from Mark, but I wanted to reach out because we need your help to hit our May fundraising deadline before **midnight tonight.**
Our goal is to get 50,000 contributions, and I was looking over the numbers this morning and we still have a little bit of work to do to get there — 2,138 donations to be exact.
Hitting this goal is so important because this month One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking our campaign.
And we are taking this seriously, because the election is still **_17 months_** away and the McConnell-backed super PAC and allies are already dumping big money into this race.
**So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to fall short of this goal. Mark needs our help to hold this seat. So here’s the part where I ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We can’t afford to fall short of this goal, not when National Republicans are already spending large sums to defeat us in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210531-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=694_6688874_PcTV5D&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210531-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=694_6688874_PcTV5D&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210531-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=694_6688874_PcTV5D&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210531-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=694_6688874_PcTV5D&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210531-1-subs&t=5&refcode2=694_6688874_PcTV5D&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210531-1-subs&t=6&refcode2=694_6688874_PcTV5D&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210531-1-subs&t=7&refcode2=694_6688874_PcTV5D&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D)
---|---
I can’t thank you enough for standing with Mark.
Once we’ve wrapped up this deadline, I’ll be back in touch with more on what’s next for us. So stay tuned and thank you for being a part of this team, it means so much to Mark and to all of us on Team Kelly.
Full speed ahead!
Emma Brown
Campaign Manager
Mark Kelly for Senate
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210531-1-subs&t=8&refcode2=694_6688874_PcTV5D&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=694%2E6688874%2EPcTV5D).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Harold
subject: This Memorial Day...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia |
body:
Today on Memorial day, I wanted to email you personally. | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=814344cb79c143d8b7df47cb90da491f&_e=xmXFNAfyRh3XwLCGAgQHpuP3R5ZB5twFBTdQEjS0IHcuD1KLB2bq4DEAYXyVjKPriFigxs0ua5SUaxHSNIvjzw_LE26_BmjoEa2aPQMpM_OYR6AEZpIHs6gSNoV3RqaL2EptQWoK1_dbyYuaFD97A8GQJqGa8Rl_IxebE9ExvgGv58kFIhgnJMpXnkrBaNV0Jca9H_HJ7iwgqPXfsKaIt2slud1w6FSz3zXxmgXicBSLruAN_X-keEIwfC7Nr54jg3YYyII-BqKe7PwVkjnTsDKOJFtCU-JMtXwhgGfgA8IL7VNap_f1hnEIs5xP59_GVSlyW0kkS1Zlvn2OQxX1uj9ZNBK1GwHYE3goGA0mGuC0KXRaKPA6ITs-VpfjPAcwUqRBNxDi1NXHjZloX4ZQiEtxZTACcTGYUjKog9wEBHDD4bbvIPiL9NuYDpptcHySPewItbvIocBndxcrzgDgbg%3D%3D)
|
---
Hey Peter -

Today on Memorial day, I wanted to email you personally.

Every day in Arlington I witnessed a glimpse into our courage, our dignity and our sacrifice we were founded upon. As I passed headstones, I often thought about what their faces looked like. The life they had...and of the life they should of had.

I wondered how they spent their last breaths. Was it on a remote beach somewhere in the Pacific or scaling the cliffs at Normandy? Was it charging a nefarious enemy at Pork Chop Hill, or crossing rice patties in the Chosin Reservoir?

|
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=814344cb79c143d8b7df47cb90da491f&_e=xmXFNAfyRh3XwLCGAgQHpp2_oU1WFqLzw05PBqEVB0Kdm9fiBPFtmCc8WPLvaMbXM_fxdXm5Ri2vvu2M3T2_BzmuIXe92NQoJXCfMIIla8rj9rvdThPs4T_26EtvmTUSFrKRPyn-NAmDqGCrlYr-oPXOeT84H2dxFKXatyQMoK2C7Cl1VGuQAuokp3cbUOywqwpgm00htY5AFyoTlr-UellDp1l5uB9Wd_K6gZp14VcplmwV8DorRetvWlORp9HaNblZmu6OmBPb12CLDB4HVgL_PfUxJqcamy7O2hQMhL5RWz62CJOqxyWXSjGtiEeB-uml8QYYn8M6WoQByYyYlBGfSz5jfR36lzshBptwdo8ww780xPz3Ic83UZlYitcl3cTPzKBfr3tSD8AngDqVgzC5huwGk5jWo7pCdIJYcQFCL-7Tua3Kix3lH2cDjnTjeOJQ2y71F5mLc81J0OYKViswfE57743M9kVve-Kocg0%3D)
|
---
I would pass the 9/11 Pentagon memorial where 184 patriots lie in a mass burial because their bodies were so battered, they could not be identified. I’d see weathered headstones in section 27 that read ‘Unknown Citizens’, for those Union black soldiers who were not considered dignified enough by their country to be buried with their name and title as an American Soldier – the striking realization of how far we’ve come. In section 60, I would pass fresh dirt that was out of place surrounding a freshly minted headstone, where newly placed flowers leaned against a loved one’s grave. Their petals, a colorfully stark reminder of the present sacrifice required to keep this country free.

For some it was heroic, others, it was simple obedience to duty. But to all, it was a common belief in this country. A common belief in the ideals of freedom, self-government and the dream that is America. A belief that although she has her flaws, her ideals are still worth fighting for.

Every day, but today especially, we must never forget those that sacrificed so much, and equally important, we must never forget why they were willing to sacrifice so much in the first place.

Harold
