name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: Remembering our Soldiers
body:
Today we honor those who gave the ultimate sacrifice.
| | [](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=memorial_day_2021_01&n=1)
---
| Peter, Today we remember those who gave the ultimate sacrifice to protect our nation. We shall never forget the sacrifices made by our brave soldiers in our Armed Forces. While we have soldiers fighting to ensure our freedoms, we must keep fighting to ensure that everyone has the freedoms some take advantage of. As a citizen of the United States and as a Military Spouse I thank each and every person who has served, is serving, and those who have given the ultimate sacrifice to ensure our freedom. We must never forget these individuals and we must carry them in our hearts. They are the ones who ensure we have the capability to fight for equity and equality in our country. We know that freedom isn't free, we have lost a lot of wonderful people. These brave soldiers are not just names on a wall, they are siblings, spouses, children, parents, and heroes. To those who are serving, those who have served, and to those who have given the ultimate sacrifice, I thank you from the bottom of my heart. Sincerely,
Nicolaus Sleister
Candidate for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Today we honor those who gave the ultimate sacrifice. | | | Peter, Today we remember those who gave the ultimate sacrifice to protect our nation. We shall never forget the sacrifices made by our brave soldiers in our Armed Forces. While we have soldiers fighting to ensure our freedoms, we must keep fighting to ensure that everyone has the freedoms some take advantage of. As a citizen of the United States and as a Military Spouse I thank each and every person who has served, is serving, and those who have given the ultimate sacrifice to ensure our freedom. We must never forget these individuals and we must carry them in our hearts. They are the ones who ensure we have the capability to fight for equity and equality in our country. We know that freedom isn't free, we have lost a lot of wonderful people. These brave soldiers are not just names on a wall, they are siblings, spouses, children, parents, and heroes. To those who are serving, those who have served, and to those who have given the ultimate sacrifice, I thank you from the bottom of my heart. Sincerely, Nicolaus Sleister Candidate for U.S. Senate Our mailing address is: CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 Copyright © 2020 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved. name: Culp for Congress
subject: Remember...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=Bh2lWQ&mc=JH&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJslyd6&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/29969b42-71a5-42f5-b027-084fe3ad30c0.png]

Today is a day to remember and to honor...

On the most somber of days, we do not celebrate the loss of our heroes on the field of battle or in the course of their duty serving and defending our great nation. On this day, we honor them by remembering the courage of their sacrifice. We think about the lessons their bravery can teach us and instruct our children. The greatest honor we can show those who've made the ultimate sacrifice for our nation is to embrace and practice the core values their sacrifice demonstrates and allow these great deeds to serve as a guiding light as we move forward into the great unknown of tomorrow.

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/176eed8d-58db-4979-a93e-31cdcdac2689.jpeg]

Our nation was built upon the foundation laid by the brave men and women who came before us. They turned their faces into the winds of war and walked steadfastly into hell to defend our values and to provide the peace required to build a great nation. Our nation is once again under attack from those who would undo our great achievements and give them to those undeserving souls who bear no sacrifice, demonstrate no courage, and possess no bravery.

Carry now the values of our forebearers as we come together to fight back against this current threat of globalism, toxic liberal ideology, and Marxism. The greatest honor you can show today is to commit yourself to carry on this great legacy and to face tomorrow with honor, courage, commitment, and duty.

Loren

clean_body: View online [&] [] Today is a day to remember and to honor... On the most somber of days, we do not celebrate the loss of our heroes on the field of battle or in the course of their duty serving and defending our great nation. On this day, we honor them by remembering the courage of their sacrifice. We think about the lessons their bravery can teach us and instruct our children. The greatest honor we can show those who've made the ultimate sacrifice for our nation is to embrace and practice the core values their sacrifice demonstrates and allow these great deeds to serve as a guiding light as we move forward into the great unknown of tomorrow. [] Our nation was built upon the foundation laid by the brave men and women who came before us. They turned their faces into the winds of war and walked steadfastly into hell to defend our values and to provide the peace required to build a great nation. Our nation is once again under attack from those who would undo our great achievements and give them to those undeserving souls who bear no sacrifice, demonstrate no courage, and possess no bravery. Carry now the values of our forebearers as we come together to fight back against this current threat of globalism, toxic liberal ideology, and Marxism. The greatest honor you can show today is to commit yourself to carry on this great legacy and to face tomorrow with honor, courage, commitment, and duty. Loren CONTRIBUTE TO CULP FOR CONGRESS [&] PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS , 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States You may unsubscribe [] or change your contact details [] at any time. I hope you’ll take a moment to remember those whose service made this day possible. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=529b068d04ca4e9189fbc0e301cac9b6&_e=gvVxNMiFhUjDt-bQkyH213IlLgAu_bcmNX9jLr1wpvdaM-rrk87-E7r5RhEQAvwwjkefcQQVFcfoAsO6RBpcger8wu6E6ZTtQs_KY280HOqlS4BmmMm4nIblLBvcbgP_XOmbKl7mI23VfDlzeCWSYC72al5YMJj_1rOzhwK9VwdOHY9MYx0g2_BXqP0r60ibtwasbQq3ksEdFyF-JhSszxPIsASnD_JPCH2WxMDAVDgUgXOlI1LGATw8cUQC7YZ17DEN2FKRgXnEmg_JjHzOR-Zn3OyzFMF7sn32gynystGj75FIl9_0pdGnoNW3Aq9XVRaYrqnfNPTdrtb1e-Fd_eV0wB17yu3cJ-51vY2FamZaqk5VgzgypP1pX7KaxEG4SF6SlpoJjX5IO-oo3pX5N2Tva3E3pJdyAnsHvD9Sp_cuzq1YlmCr0Yg9xJjUeIjibWLAsa6zzgGBYZccGBL9mhHwEem5WXTWJhpiHRY6fJk%3D) Hi folks, I want to wish you and your family a Happy Memorial Day. I hope you’ll take a moment to remember those whose service made this day possible. As a veteran, I’m reflecting on the courage of those who have lost their lives while serving our country since its inception. These men and women made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our freedom, our country, and our liberties. I hope your day is filled with friends, family, delicious barbeque, ice-cold drinks, and safety! Thank you,
Wilmot Collins

We’ve lived through 3 shocks to our system in the last 20 years -- 9/11, the Great Recession, and the COVID pandemic -- and we still haven’t fixed things.

In my campaign, I am fighting for the people of Wisconsin. This isn’t politics as usual, my campaign is about bringing fresh ideas to Congress so that we can help Wisconsinites.

**[We need change, and that starts by beating Ron Johnson next year. But I can’t do it alone, I need you on my side. ** We need to build roads and bridges in America, and corporations need to earn their tax breaks. clean_body: We’ve lived through 3 shocks to our system in the last 20 years -- 9/11, the Great Recession, and the COVID pandemic -- and we still haven’t fixed things. | = = People have asked me why I am running for Senate, Peter, and my answer is this: We need a new way of thinking and a new perspective in Congress. We’ve lived through 3 shocks to our system in the last 20 years -- 9/11, the Great Recession, and the COVID pandemic -- and we still haven’t fixed things. In my campaign, I am fighting for the people of Wisconsin. This isn’t politics as usual, my campaign is about bringing fresh ideas to Congress so that we can help Wisconsinites. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We need to build roads and bridges in America, and corporations need to earn their tax breaks. Progressive leadership helps our economy, and that’s what we need more of in Wisconsin. For far too long, special interest groups have been calling the shots, and we need to change that. That’s why I’m running for Senate. = Thank you, Alex Lasry | ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Memorial Day at Arlington National Cemetery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=f41e07b5d7bc4c89a8b5cfe34254743a&_e=bhIn0BxGg6G9nEXIazJ2orMTl9BhaG8PDy43clhawqEMQdUQ3Ppu2VlQiYVisdZdbwicc_agfdaXnmwIYRoLoGFWzH-9_de1B51DEwZKnH9Qw4J0Vua800UjWdIIgs65PUsBFeW-te5GWd5wtgVn91q8coIgNW2Hp-p6lXnca7jmmqcljbGfBZaE9emIPArt6RIvmsixtoir7HnV8A58APAvl15AikpaID3JBXBEriHr7KPhJcti3jfQ_XUigPlFY7YVBYK9-yUYdsL28fPRwg%3D%3D) Three years ago on Memorial Day, I accompanied the president to a ceremony at Arlington National Cemetery to honor our fallen heroes. It was technically a holiday so I got permission to bring Huck along with me. I brought Huck with me that day because he had lately expressed interest in joining the military when he grows up. My friend Sarah Flaherty was a helicopter pilot in the US Navy, which Huck thought was pretty cool. In September 2018 I had the honor of conducting Sarah's official promotion from lieutenant commander to commander. I officiated the ceremony and administered the oath and, as a thank-you, Sarah gave me the bars from her uniform that I had helped switch out to signify her new rank. Huck loved to look at the bars that I kept in my office and told me he would like to have some like them someday and that when he did, he wanted me to change his, too. I figured this day would be a good way to show Huck what true sacrifice and bravery really means and for him to meet some real superheroes—not the fake cartoon ones he watched on TV. After the ceremony finished and we were waiting to head back to the White House, General Dunford came by to say hi to Huck. I introduced Huck to him and told Huck he was a real superhero. Huck proudly told him he wanted to be a real superhero, too, and was going to be in the Army when he grows up. General Dunford said, "That's not bad, son, but I’m pretty sure you’d rather be a Marine." On this Memorial Day weekend, thank you to all the heroes who paid the ultimate price to keep us free! God bless,
Sarah Huckabee Sanders |
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
| PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.shsforgov.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_s=f41e07b5d7bc4c89a8b5cfe34254743a&_t=5D8N39_zKTWZJx3lN6jqq_dwUXXP1ZPNg2iRmnqxiELfJat_gIrKj3bu9podbwTQQtV6Jgfk1GvNsNyfEYjX60BlUUqFa614fSs6bXpTGxH8KkkqzAg-oS3BPRPLvDgs6GleQa6eVDZlD_m6o9n_18W64GznkcNynA_WzehUh4A%3D) |

[](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJR0dSM2j2AnD639ONGsZW8Y9N6vewyZwPH5_N33Hn7DLsvuffN1NWUFV0JBknUjtqAXQYNXh7aMsSkbnbfSOgx9kMQcN7EqQ-wQZrCbozvq9-WYacyPh4kuldMEBOJYKav-L_Ot0yWVTiDcLv27XVcz1w6C7iLO25hOCgFlRgvz_SUID_KaAFyEw0_Q3--slCsLm5tXcpG1Biqod8b-24NV9oAfISPwrraFB1t_DxTG_XN9KkG2e4OYLLapKJrHR_hII7BJkKtdKwRtBXJvbqrWI7rTgDE6FyzE1HEYdGAiFvEK30lmQe8_hjP7rcrheArCggGprPuG-ttR0RJClA1-1wE0lwqupFn8ddMdYta_YIz0wNo-PfU5zlqQFp6iPzA%3D%3D) We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe. Today, on this Memorial Day, we wanted to start the newsletter out by taking a moment to remember the sacrifices of those who gave everything to keep our country free. And we hope that you'll also take a moment today to pause and remember, then go on about enjoying those freedoms. 🇺🇸 | |

**In the News**
**WALTZ ON BIDEN**

Last Saturday the 22nd, Mike joined [Fox News](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJR0dSM2j2AnD639ONGsZW8Y9N6vewyZwPH5_N33Hn7DLccZ_5KONhr59tcSQnXgp0fP-hFQx8P0nfGPaQ78K6rJ8ZX0JtEYvEFJ22kJPwPaX2b6utGDAEAODJ9yKFTg2gkVW0A8dEux9GOuK33ChHPcgyxgItxtlqAmVEiUaeoMvuqJ0ImmSXTJCeSexoAPrWHUMhC4qU4jXKNV7DYzWytGw2DgGJ1bHAhYt6mrI0ydW5hEEq0X8T9dhVdwSVEqMmJ1AGB3q6RThuHMRn8i_SYR2JgZJAPE4dOWwhoB1Iu8GaL1jtt9O53C5n3S974_dbHsOw8EUCu46czh05ZQO4mZ7OAUewaDxMOUOnk7hmV1OA38PPkXFCRQz059DSH1MjA%3D%3D) to discuss Joe Biden’s failure to hold Russia accountable.

_“In Biden’s first day in office he cancels a pipeline, Russia backed hackers attack our biggest pipeline, Colonial, after he canceled Keystone, and now were just going to let the Russians have their pipeline and give away the sanctions. We get nothing in return.”_

[](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJR0dSM2j2AnD639ONGsZW8Y9N6vewyZwPH5_N33Hn7DLccZ_5KONhr59tcSQnXgp0fP-hFQx8P0nfGPaQ78K6rJ8ZX0JtEYvEFJ22kJPwPaX2b6utGDAEAODJ9yKFTg2gkVW0A8dEux9GOuK33ChHPcgyxgItxtlqAmVEiUaeoMvkWZer-vY9a4nRvwyi0M1M0mHTWoPnGztic9AMpbTQDqSd2TFt2YHB_3WobSwuMqaskF9PnToiLD6iy_PZ7z8cof6FQo6U6SNP7HYLPZ2C0KLU7zqs6CYMH6DjLzOWaVKTlkr5jfZ3gtQuhENXbUs5At5ojVsO_kj4FdGmXqr_3CKPwEOEL8EV-TkS1Evipn56nIzTdwsBFZKPNnhE7JoGg%3D%3D)

Mike also [spoke](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJR0dSM2j2AnD639ONGsZW8Y9N6vewyZwPH5_N33Hn7DLdlSeHP-SXS1QjX6gG4pPfFJptAqekLI7-2pU_rq8j-cSRUSP8og6SZMIFzOXVZhiGe8yL1bI6xyYiL77d9X-j6GVxNN897wT9mqHeuJFK8MTAr4T1bnvIwn9eCH9SH-_mPLSx4EuZeWoPOQmNg-MX4XiQ4bfOpIQsAE8AOOgEDGCB-ptrfGKzLkQTXp87xcQ9uFV561Q1FiofzLfjJWmMoyhsCdTE5CjIfETUKJJv-mPufwNNjU8GMx6XbeQP351fqicuXh9gd0eVz5dVQ03Q_o7owtT2G37gtITJ0oJUX9bKXG1H5fF0h4lSOIKLVktX4vc6gplMRCkvNFTMdexkg%3D%3D) about how Joe Biden is displaying weakness to the world.

_“Our adversaries smell weakness in the White House — and that's what we see around the world right now. From Russia's pipeline to Hamas attacking Israel & the threat of China. And when they smell weakness they push and they’re emboldened. Under President Trump they were deterred by strength.” _

He went on to [talk](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJR0dSM2j2AnD639ONGsZW8Y9N6vewyZwPH5_N33Hn7DLcZp5Y53h1guNoXE3OgsABiFzoqlcmY0g3AbzWlLSEiIseCWeTVkF9etSd7q5zWdfXumwDqfT39qOxpxpluuMIF9srfuewKmHdMrDWDLRHglBAT6JNnv8_uPOioXhZDvP9ErudhwNXRbMCvm2XjTs8OOtde72ppaPjWGKwHbxB9RtyCrpE_dqywpWIeWc8IFZsnoT-9e3e2cXegHoWyFSlTHr0ypFprhvovYhKvpa2t9ITvluPg2Wf7MDf33WFhmWQ5uX18TM4Yy8q60n4dB0MD3giZoV4UREFQoG_NoJuScTBoaPvkZcY-1PyvN2kfBvKAqBvPqaqQ_JEV2mE-_6Kw%3D%3D) about how weak Joe Biden’s policy on China has become.

_“The Chinese Communist Party is trying to bankrupt the U.S. with COVID and the debt deficit as more and more American dollars flow into China thanks to the Biden administrations frivolous spending.”_
**WALTZ INTRODUCES BILL TO PUNISH CORPORATIONS FROM SPONSORING CHINA’S GENOCIDE OLYMPICS**

On Friday, Mike introduced legislation that would punish corporations who sponsor the 2022 Beijing Genocide Olympics by preventing them from contracting with the US Government for business and also bans the sale of their products in federal buildings and military bases.

[](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJbU6Tvfky-SaBav-8_qlU6MkCfMRz7T6Ax-BNrcLUGGcKgHP9Pgfj6NudNYL7CuVHd8acwTBDWebXpbyHeNZRGpVZnK7CnsG3S_rnpEzAoZcmyhCTFHj5WUKYXf_Grf4v0TMvZwGMrKrrRu7mzzxcBvNX2L1bEj-qIeQALWcz-WDJhTFjm46CVUEDT37OzCGW530AO7_XlC3_LTag9vk4Rbfv1X7tmGKh79hFK3mYNVQzGUg1RP251qT-5ENhG2Frdg-nCBGGQxx4N7HoUmzVA8L8sGkcl0uGylJpDbCiyyw1auAosOpUmqAr82moynRc80AqNkFUUy54DzbC-7r7CM6sUAbq4kOBwOn_IVggjUN)

Mike discussed this effort on [Fox Business](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJbU6Tvfky-SaBav-8_qlU6MkCfMRz7T6Ax-BNrcLUGGcKgHP9Pgfj6NudNYL7CuVHd8acwTBDWebXpbyHeNZRGpVZnK7CnsG3S_rnpEzAoZcmyhCTFHj5WUKYXf_Grf4v0TMvZwGMrKrrRu7mzzxcBtm1pymB9loMKgd7bxNUuybS6XjJrclYQXIRAWo4Igt1l-800a5_bT4q3T1jZetVKcVNRH24rWvetgGQPpnFFZed7uScnrahY2AZ8oS6O1BcLmW0o858Ov0LvBuqWARks1lF1ObnHknEmMnQB07vXLxTNFY2pmrZpRka-RNBcy7m_R42gPNe8aHOBeADvuCPLDsR7wCMDVW41SZ1wLbLRau) Friday morning:

_“Our corporations have been just as complicit and that’s why I’m introducing legislation that would punish any corporation that supports China’s Genocide Olympics. If you’re a corporation and you’re going to boycott Georgia but then look the other way when it comes to a million Muslims in slave labor in China, then you’re no longer going to be able to do business with the US Government.”_

You can watch the clip [here](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJbU6Tvfky-SaBav-8_qlU6MkCfMRz7T6Ax-BNrcLUGGcKgHP9Pgfj6NudNYL7CuVHd8acwTBDWebXpbyHeNZRGpVZnK7CnsG3S_rnpEzAoZcmyhCTFHj5WUKYXf_Grf4v0TMvZwGMrKrrRu7mzzxcBtCJ9KedKW9wRuACOsfFZ4vltLspfnd9a_qN2awpp0rdsvXiOpOmGZq89fQRXUp4MZDfitEs2FIYlC1ir4FjttBvYjNrWol7_WjXACW3LSrQKa4UcePlKfMVw84HAWPT2EJKSvh5VjhtL0_UnuhUgo7YKavJ4OLTX8GiIvuZlFmArR3Z063FCOEWR_O_qaHYbtdb7el2CZ3DoAuOTYRx0Rn).
**WALTZ ON THE HAMAS CAUCUS**

On Monday, Mike joined [Fox and Friends](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=ac837912ef4141d6a28813457b270a22&_e=7m5Qc_SEMCXl8oMjRfQwJbQIIkPfGcuKgNNGpvv68h6LdxEVCj7FACvHGiPq79kUfsYPR9XqYaN_rKeyjs315b19RkAcU9R_ejI5hJrdF2uM7I897ySEkkN74zbJLQLUUIKBbUkDWgfSvUZhx9-0X4dQzerm8VS4kiCPLpRaoRyzyQbb8-5LE5p7qVWAPKvDWzcYrXyrHqx8jp8tlxOJZGDiJ88DcDxeNlalR0OWu5hWFnxBwu6cH1JKl7gIr-oWaj1DPdBfVY1tSfbssUFgSYd8S7E9rpHsVmYbI5A7oxZ3TTa3kZN5Aj62SPLBhDIMQnmdgPwldudavm-IbhbXYUGGR6jHbsfVbkQo0wE8zMfYGgO6UuqT_vz81RXit4e5TPTs_hOcVAjmnqngPGGcag%3D%3D) to defend Israel and discuss the Hamas Caucus in Congress.

Last week, Mike responded to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s outrageous comments suggesting that members of Congress who were in Washington DC on January 6th 2021 “served in war” due to the capitol riot. This story was covered in Breitbart News:

The Florida Republican and combat-decorated veteran addressed Ocasio-Cortez’s comparison, deeming it both “sad and ignorant” and adding a dose of reality to her “false” equivalency by pointing out the New York Democrat “hasn’t lost fellow soldiers on the battlefield or seen friends permanently disfigured by Taliban attacks.”

_“AOC doesn’t know what it’s like to come under attack by machine gun fire, mortars or RPGs. She hasn’t seen the horror of roadside IED explosions on bystanders & children,” he continued._

_“She hasn’t lost fellow soldiers on the battlefield or seen friends permanently disfigured by Taliban attacks,” Waltz added._

_“Don’t use false equivalencies to make a point. Especially as it relates to war,” he concluded. _

clean_body: Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe. Today, on this Memorial Day, we wanted to start the newsletter out by taking a moment to remember the sacrifices of those who gave everything to keep our country free. And we hope that you'll also take a moment today to pause and remember, then go on about enjoying those freedoms. 🇺🇸 | | In the News WALTZ ON BIDEN Last Saturday the 22nd, Mike joined to discuss Joe Biden’s failure to hold Russia accountable. “In Biden’s first day in office he cancels a pipeline, Russia backed hackers attack our biggest pipeline, Colonial, after he canceled Keystone, and now were just going to let the Russians have their pipeline and give away the sanctions. We get nothing in return.” Mike also about how Joe Biden is displaying weakness to the world. “Our adversaries smell weakness in the White House — and that's what we see around the world right now. From Russia's pipeline to Hamas attacking Israel & the threat of China. And when they smell weakness they push and they’re emboldened. Under President Trump they were deterred by strength.” He went on to about how weak Joe Biden’s policy on China has become. “The Chinese Communist Party is trying to bankrupt the U.S. with COVID and the debt deficit as more and more American dollars flow into China thanks to the Biden administrations frivolous spending.” WALTZ INTRODUCES BILL TO PUNISH CORPORATIONS FROM SPONSORING CHINA’S GENOCIDE OLYMPICS On Friday, Mike introduced legislation that would punish corporations who sponsor the 2022 Beijing Genocide Olympics by preventing them from contracting with the US Government for business and also bans the sale of their products in federal buildings and military bases. Mike discussed this effort on Friday morning: “Our corporations have been just as complicit and that’s why I’m introducing legislation that would punish any corporation that supports China’s Genocide Olympics. If you’re a corporation and you’re going to boycott Georgia but then look the other way when it comes to a million Muslims in slave labor in China, then you’re no longer going to be able to do business with the US Government.” You can watch the clip . WALTZ ON THE HAMAS CAUCUS On Monday, Mike joined to defend Israel and discuss the Hamas Caucus in Congress. “As a Green Beret, I fought alongside our allies against terrorism. Never did I ever think I would serve in Congress with the Hamas Caucus who's defending terrorist attacks on our greatest ally in the Middle East, Israel.” Watch the entire interview . WALTZ ON AOC’S OUTRAGEOUS COMMENTS ABOUT SERVING IN WAR Last week, Mike responded to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s outrageous comments suggesting that members of Congress who were in Washington DC on January 6th 2021 “served in war” due to the capitol riot. This story was covered in Breitbart News: The Florida Republican and combat-decorated veteran addressed Ocasio-Cortez’s comparison, deeming it both “sad and ignorant” and adding a dose of reality to her “false” equivalency by pointing out the New York Democrat “hasn’t lost fellow soldiers on the battlefield or seen friends permanently disfigured by Taliban attacks.” “AOC doesn’t know what it’s like to come under attack by machine gun fire, mortars or RPGs. She hasn’t seen the horror of roadside IED explosions on bystanders & children,” he continued. “She hasn’t lost fellow soldiers on the battlefield or seen friends permanently disfigured by Taliban attacks,” Waltz added. “Don’t use false equivalencies to make a point. Especially as it relates to war,” he concluded. Read more here: WALTZ ON IRAN AND HAMAS On Wednesday, Mike was on with Martha MacCallum to talk Biden's leadership, and the crisises in the Middle East, at our borders and with our gas pipelines. Mike started the interview with discussing his reaction to the crisis in the Middle East, saying: "It's very clear that Israel is our ally and Hamas is a terrorist organization backed by Iran...shame on the Left for trying to make a moral equivalent between Hamas and our ally, Israel. Biden's response is to throw cash at the Iranian Regime & the Palestinians with a naive hope that everyone will get along.” WALTZ ON KEEPING CHINA OUT OF OUR MILITARY'S PENSIONS On Tuesday, Mike joined with other members of Congress to introduce the TSP Act to prevent Chinese companies from receiving pension investment money from US Government employees. Later in the week, Mike joined to talk about the TSP Act and the national security threat of using our military’s Thrift Saving and 401k programs to invest in businesses linked directly to the Chinese Communist Party. “The military’s 401k program is investing into Beijing stock exchange and funding the #CCP's military build up that America may have to fight. It's insane that our tax dollars are funding our greatest adversaries.” You can watch the entire clip . You can watch the entire clip . Mike also about how the Senate Democrats radical spending plan is basically giving away U.S. taxpayer dollars to China. “The Left's default reaction is to throw money at a problem without knowing WHERE it's going to end up. Meanwhile, the Chinese Communist Party is stealing research from taxpayer-funded programs, handing it to their military, and leapfrogging ahead of us. Americans shouldn't fund our greatest adversary.” Watch the rest of the clip . Watch the rest of the clip | Store Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, yard signs, and now...koozies! | Social Media Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Mike remember to use #WaltzWarriors | That's it for this week. Thanks for all of you support and stay tuned for more! Be sure to follow Mike on social media! | | ---|--- Paid for by Michael Waltz For Congress Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Michael Waltz For Congress

body:
#

**_Breaking News:_ A Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona**
_Chip in before midnight to help hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate!_
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=1&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-)**
there —
On Saturday, Mark reached out himself about how important hitting our 50,000 contribution goal is.
Then yesterday, we reached out again to ask for your help because we can’t afford to fall short when the Mitch McConnell-backed super PAC and National Republicans are already pouring money into this race.
And this morning, our Campaign Manager, Emma, reached out again because we’re still 2,138 donations short and our deadline is in just a few hours!
**So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to fall short of this goal. We’re already seeing incoming from outside groups and Mark needs our help to hold this seat. So before time runs out, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation before midnight? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 50,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=2&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=3&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=4&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=5&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=6&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=7&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=8&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-)
---|---
Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this critical goal. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever National Republicans decide to throw at us as we gear up to run again in 2022.
Thank you again, we couldn’t do this without you!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210531-2-subs&t=9&refcode2=695_6688874_IQNqG-&akid=695%2E6688874%2EIQNqG-)**

name: Team Padilla
subject: Still Short
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

We’ve got less than 24 hours to go before our May fundraising deadline,
and we wanted to share with you a bit about why these deadlines are so
important.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21/?refcode=em210531-1-full&t=1001&refcode2=58_159979_pa-i6N&akid=58%2E159979%2Epa-i6N ]We’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re ready, we hope you’ll
consider chipping in a $3 contribution now to help us keep
building this grassroots team together.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?source=em210531-1-full&t=1002&refcode2=58_159979_pa-i6N&akid=58%2E159979%2Epa-i6N ]DONATE NOW

As of this morning, we’re still short of our goal for May.

Hitting our marks each month is critical because it allows us to continue
building momentum for progressive policies like the Green New Deal and
comprehensive immigration reform, and it also prevents us from having to
play catch-up later down the road.

More importantly, it allows Alex to focus on strengthening our movement
and keeping up the important work we need him to be doing in the Senate.

This has always been a grassroots movement right from the start. And what
that means is instead of relying on dark money or checks from special
interest groups, Alex counts on lots and lots of people chipping in what
they can when they can.

It all adds up quickly, and it’s why before midnight we have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21/?refcode=em210531-1-full&t=1003&refcode2=58_159979_pa-i6N&akid=58%2E159979%2Epa-i6N ]Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots
campaign? We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every
donation sends a powerful message that we will not back down without a
fight.

It’s support like yours that’s so crucial to our campaign. Thank you for
everything you do — it means so much to Alex to be alongside you in this
fight.

Team Padilla

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?source=em210531-1-full&t=1004&refcode2=58_159979_pa-i6N&akid=58%2E159979%2Epa-i6N ]DONATE NOW

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

[ ]We’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re ready, we hope you’ll consider chipping in a $3 contribution now to help us keep building this grassroots team together. [ ]DONATE NOW As of this morning, we’re still short of our goal for May. Hitting our marks each month is critical because it allows us to continue building momentum for progressive policies like the Green New Deal and comprehensive immigration reform, and it also prevents us from having to play catch-up later down the road. More importantly, it allows Alex to focus on strengthening our movement and keeping up the important work we need him to be doing in the Senate. This has always been a grassroots movement right from the start. And what that means is instead of relying on dark money or checks from special interest groups, Alex counts on lots and lots of people chipping in what they can when they can. It all adds up quickly, and it’s why before midnight we have to ask: [ ]Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots campaign? We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every donation sends a powerful message that we will not back down without a fight. It’s support like yours that’s so crucial to our campaign. Thank you for everything you do — it means so much to Alex to be alongside you in this fight. Team Padilla [ ]DONATE NOW You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

body:
#

Friends - We know it’s Memorial Day, so we’ll keep this short.
We created a 10,000 contribution goal for the month of May to show Congress the strength behind our movement to pass universal background checks.
We’re only a few hours away from our deadline, and as of our latest count, we only need 139 donations to cross the finish line. Can you help?
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 donation May fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21&amount=3&refcode=em210531-2-15?t=1&refcode2=180_3935704_fX1mvA&akid=180%2E3935704%2EfX1mvA)

clean_body: Friends - We know it’s Memorial Day, so we’ll keep this short. We created a 10,000 contribution goal for the month of May to show Congress the strength behind our movement to pass universal background checks. We’re only a few hours away from our deadline, and as of our latest count, we only need 139 donations to cross the finish line. Can you help? We’ve never been closer to passing universal background checks. And we can’t afford to come up short now, so please stand with us as we urge the Senate to sign this legislation into law. Thank you for being a partner in our fight to save lives. Team Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
